name: Okra with Tomatoes & Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the okra thoroughly.
2. Cut off any hard stems and dry it completely.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan.
4. Fry the onions with halved garlic cloves until they are slightly soft, transparent, and golden.
5. Add the okra and continue to fry until it is slightly softened.
6. Add the sliced tomatoes and sauté for a few minutes longer.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour in water, bring to a boil, and simmer until the okra is very tender (about 1 hour).
9. Squeeze in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
